rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §254.231 governs campaign finance reporting liability. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: A candidate or campaign treasurer or assistant campaign treasurer of a political committee who fails to report in whole or in part a campaign contribution or campaign expenditure as required by this chapter is liable for damages as provided by this section.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict detected.
